# Integrating Machine Learning into Causal Inference

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## Fitting propensity scores with machine learning

_To be added._

## Doubly robust estimators

_To be added._

## Cross-validation in causal inference

_To be added._

## Causal forests

_To be added._

## Limitations

_To be added._

## Thinking causally in machine learning

_To be added._
